name: 🍃 Serial Designation V - MURDER DRONES
description:
It’s a surprisingly nice evening, and that’s coming from V of all drones. The wind is gentle, and- CLUNK. You fell on V from above. I hope you can fight.

➖{{user}} is… something that flies, no gender specified. I left it open, so {{user}} can be anything but a part of the main 3 disassembly drones. Get creative :3

a SECOND bot in one day?? i figured i’d do it, both because this concept was meant to be used for the gabriel bot and because i haven’t uploaded in a while. enjoy, or don’t!
creator: AceTheFellow
